emails.subject: Trade
emails.body: Trade I offered you my 1 and 3 for your 1 and 4. I can throw in my 5 for your 6. Let me know. Eric

emails.subject: Re: Trade
emails.body: Re: Trade Sorry man, I am swamped today. Doing my book and Trey's and I have a 6 p.m. flight to Utah. I will try and get back with you today. The offer will definitely have to get sweeter to get the 2 pick overall. PL
